summary: Markets are volatile amid escalating US-Iran conflict tensions, driving sharp gains in oil prices to 4-year highs while stocks face pressure from geopolitical risks and high energy costs. Crypto sentiment remains neutral due to lack of specific commentary, with broader risk-off mood dominating. Commodities like Brent crude show bullish momentum from supply disruption fears.
